US Serving USA

Custom Clothing Manufacturer for USA Brands

MOQ 50 pieces·DDP shipping to USA·Quotes in 24h
Home › Custom Clothing Manufacturer for USA Brands

Why American Brands Manufacture with FABRIOZA

  • 50-piece MOQ: launch or test a style without committing to a container. Most factories serving the USA demand 300–500 pieces per design.
  • Factory-direct pricing: we are the factory in Sialkot, Pakistan — no trading company margin. Typical savings vs US domestic production run 40–60%.
  • Verified standards: ISO 9001 quality management, BSCI social compliance, OEKO-TEX fabric safety, WRAP certification — the audit trail American retailers ask for.
  • English-first communication with US-morning working-hours overlap, quotes inside 24 hours, and one point of contact from sample to delivery.

Shipping & Duties to the United States

OptionTransitBest for
DHL/FedEx express (DDP)3–5 business daysDrops, restocks up to ~500 pcs
Air freight (DDP)7–10 days500–2,000 pcs
Sea freight30–40 days2,000+ pcs, planned inventory

Cotton knitwear into the US carries roughly 16.5% duty; our DDP quotes bundle it so the number you approve is the number you pay - no surprise brokerage invoices. We also maintain a US office in McDonough, Georgia for appointments and stateside support, and we cut garments on US sizing blocks (not slim Asian fits), which keeps your return rate down.

Who This Is For

DTC startups doing their first 50–200 piece drop, Amazon and Shopify private-label sellers, gyms and teams ordering custom uniforms, and growing streetwear labels moving off blanks (see our streetwear playbook).

What We Manufacture for American Brands

Team uniforms & sportswear (16 categories), streetwear (heavyweight tees, oversized hoodies, cargo), women's fashion, blazers & suits, medical scrubs, kidswear, plus size, menswear, intimate apparel and sustainable/eco garments — all fully private-labeled under your brand. See everything we make.

How It Works

  1. Send your design — tech pack, sketch or reference image. Free mockup within 24–48 hours.
  2. Approve your sample — produced in 5–7 days, shipped to your door in USA.
  3. Bulk production — 2–4 weeks with 4-stage QC (fabric inspection, in-line checks, AQL 2.5 sampling, photo documentation).
  4. DDP delivery — we handle export, freight and US customs duties; you receive sealed cartons ready to sell.

FAQ: Manufacturing for American Brands

Do you handle US customs and duties?

Yes - we ship DDP (Delivered Duty Paid): export clearance, freight, US duties (~16.5% on cotton knits) and delivery are all included in your quote. You receive the cartons with nothing extra to pay.

How fast is shipping from Pakistan to the USA?

DHL/FedEx express takes 3-5 business days door-to-door. Air freight 7-10 days, sea freight 30-40 days for large orders. Total timeline from approved sample to US delivery is typically 3-5 weeks.

Do you use American sizing?

Yes. We grade patterns on US size blocks (true S-XXL and plus sizes) and can match the fit of any US reference garment you send us.

What is your minimum order for US brands?

50 pieces per style per colorway - a full size run. Most US brands start with 50-150 pieces to test, then reorder winners in 2-4 week cycles.

Do you have a US location?

Yes - a US office at 157 Everett Sq, McDonough, GA 30252 (visits by appointment), with production at our ISO 9001 factory in Sialkot, Pakistan.

Get Your USA Landed-Cost Quote

Send your design and quantities - we reply within 24 hours with unit price, shipping and US customs duties included, so you know your exact landed cost.
